ignoreCommand: if [ -z "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" ]; then exit 1; fi; git cat-file -e $VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA^{commit} 2>/dev/null || exit 1; if ! git diff --quiet $VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA $VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA -- apps/website 2>/dev/null; then exit 1; fi; if [ "$GITHUB_ACTIONS" = "true" ]; then exit 1; fi; exit 0
